free_text: Isoscalar giant resonances in 48Ca
Experiment performed at Texas A&M
University K500 superconducting cyclotron
Self-supporting 48Ca foils 4.4
mg/cm2 thick, located in the center of the target
chamber of the multipoledipole-multipole spectrometer.
Multipole-dipole-multipole spectrometer. The
horizontal acceptance of the spectrometer was 4deg
and the vertical acceptance was set at +-2deg. Ray
tracing was used to reconstruct the scattering angle.
The out-of-plane scattering angle was not measured
Total uncertainty, which include contributions
from collected charge, target thickness, dead time,
and solid angle.
Compiled by S.H.
